text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Good news, my guinea pi—I mean, Trainer. I'll be
gracing you with a colleague soon.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It's quite the cute critter too. If you leave it be,
it'll run inside its wheel for eternity.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Since you two are practically one and the same,
perhaps I should have you cohabitate as well? I
could put you both in a cage and...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Aaahahaha! Calm yourself, I was merely joking.
Unfortunately, pets are not allowed on campus!
